changelog: v2.0.0 — Full UI redesign (DataSense). Added drag-and-drop column selector, Logic Checks tab, enhanced EDA with multi-variable charts and heatmaps, straightlining base variable selection, verbatim quality checks via Ollama, onboarding tooltips, settings panel, theme switcher.
v1.1.0 — Added straightlining, interviewer duration/productivity, consent/eligibility, fabrication detection, enhanced logic checks with rich operators.
v1.0.0 — Initial release. Missing value checks, range checks, duplicate detection, pattern validation, basic EDA.
